key_takeaway: With 50 properties in Portugal, Hopstays is primed to scale — Boom gives you the automation and AI-powered tools to grow your portfolio without growing your team proportionally.
summary_bullets: Portugal's STR market is one of the fastest-growing in Europe — Boom helps you capture maximum revenue with dynamic pricing tuned to seasonal tourism patterns
At 50 properties, you're at the stage where manual processes start becoming a real bottleneck — Boom automates the repetitive work so your team can focus on growth
You mentioned you found us at a convention — great timing, because we're actively expanding our European partner base and have deep experience in the Portugal market

discussion_points.title: Managing 50 Properties in Portugal
items: Portugal's tourism seasons create huge demand swings — pricing needs to be responsive to peak periods, holidays, and local events
Multi-language guest communication (Portuguese, English, French, Spanish) across multiple channels
Coordinating cleaning and maintenance across a growing portfolio
Competition from other PMs for owner acquisition — differentiation matters
Reporting and transparency for property owners

discussion_points.title: How Boom Solves This
items: Dynamic pricing that adapts to Portugal's seasonal patterns, local events, and competitor rates automatically
AI-powered multilingual guest communication — BAM responds in any language, 24/7, with instant accuracy
Automated task management — cleaning and turnover tasks auto-assign from your booking calendar
Professional owner portal and reporting that helps you win and retain property owners
One platform for everything — PMS, channel manager, pricing, comms, tasks, accounting

discussion_points.title: Growth Opportunities
items: Direct booking website — reduce Airbnb and Booking.com commissions
Scale from 50 to 100+ properties with the same team size
AI-powered guest upsells — offer experiences, early check-in, and premium services automatically

demo_highlights.benefit: All 50 listings optimally priced for Portugal's seasonal demand. Peak summer, off-season, local festivals — all handled automatically.
BAM communicates with guests in Portuguese, English, French, Spanish — instantly. No language barriers, no delays.
Cleaning and maintenance auto-scheduled from bookings. Your field team follows the app. No missed turnovers.
Real-time revenue dashboards and automated statements. Win new owners with professional, transparent reporting.

next_steps.action: Book a 30-minute discovery call to see Boom in action
